positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic forest spirit intertwined with celestial elements. The design features glowing, bioluminescent flora, crystalline geometric patterns, and abstracted celestial bodies like crescent moons and constellations. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, midnight indigo, shimmering gold, and emerald green. The composition must be centralized, utilizing strong negative space for clean silhouettes, achieving high contrast and a luxurious, mystical feel. Rendered in a blend of intricate linework, modern vector art, and ethereal digital painting textures, perfect for apparel screen printing.
negative: artifacts, blurry, noise, text, signature, watermark, poorly drawn hands, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, grain, monochromatic, ugly, disfigured, clutter
